description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test_runner that runs on every pull request to the dev branch, on workflow calls, and on workflow dispatches. The workflow has two jobs: run_tests and report_coverage. The run_tests job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, ensures black format, runs tests with coverage, and uploads coverage to Coveralls. The report_coverage job runs after run_tests and finalizes the coverage report on Coveralls.
